notes: Confirmed: Blazor WASM views (SKCanvasView, SKGLView) have no wheel event support. Source inspection shows no wheel/touch event listeners in SKHtmlCanvas.ts/js, no input event interop in SKHtmlCanvasInterop.cs, and no OnTouch/OnWheel parameters in SKCanvasView.razor.cs. Runtime verification in a Blazor WASM app (SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor 3.119.2) confirms the canvas element has no wheel handler registered (canvas.onwheel is null, dispatched WheelEvent.defaultPrevented is false). The SKTouchAction.WheelChanged and SKTouchEventArgs.WheelDelta types exist in the MAUI event model but have not been exposed in Blazor views. Multi-version testing skipped per enhancement reproduction guidelines.

reproductionSteps.description: Inspect SKHtmlCanvas.ts and SKHtmlCanvas.js for wheel event listeners — confirms no wheel support in JS layer
reproductionSteps.output: No matches found. Neither TypeScript nor JavaScript source contains any wheel event references.

reproductionSteps.description: Inspect Blazor C# source for touch/wheel event support — confirms no input event handling in C# layer
reproductionSteps.output: No matches found. No touch or wheel event handling exists in the Blazor view layer.

reproductionSteps.description: Verify SKHtmlCanvasInterop.cs only has rendering interop (no input events)
reproductionSteps.output: [JSImport] InitGL, InitRaster, Deinit, RequestAnimationFrame, PutImageData — rendering only, no input event interop.

reproductionSteps.description: Confirm WheelChanged/WheelDelta exist in MAUI event model (reference implementation exists but not in Blazor)
reproductionSteps.output: SKTouchAction.WheelChanged and SKTouchEventArgs.WheelDelta found in MAUI Core. Windows SKTouchHandler subscribes to PointerWheelChanged. This event model exists but is not exposed in Blazor views.

reproductionSteps.description: Create and build Blazor WASM test project with SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor 3.119.2
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet new blazorwasm -n Repro --framework net10.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor --version 3.119.2 && dotnet build

filesCreated.description: Blazor page with SKCanvasView rendering a blue canvas with text prompt to scroll wheel over it

reproductionSteps.description: Run Blazor app, navigate with Playwright, verify canvas renders and confirm no wheel handler exists
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet run --urls http://localhost:5111 --no-build && Playwright: navigate, snapshot, evaluate WheelEvent dispatch
reproductionSteps.output: Canvas rendered successfully (796x596). Console: 'SUCCESS: rendered 796x596'. No errors. Dispatched WheelEvent on canvas: defaultPrevented=false. canvas.onwheel=null (no handler registered). Feature is absent — wheel events are silently ignored.

versionResults.notes: Feature does not exist. Canvas renders correctly but has no wheel event handler. This is expected for an enhancement request.
Multi-version testing skipped per enhancement reproduction guidelines — there is nothing to regress-test for a feature that has never existed.

actionability.reason: Maintainer-filed enhancement with detailed spec. Feature confirmed absent in both source code and runtime. Part of cross-platform v120 normalization project (#3533). Prior PR #3528 was closed without merging.

actions.description: Update area label to area/SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor and add os/WASM

proposedResponse.body:
Reproduction confirms this feature is currently absent:

- **Source inspection**: No wheel/touch event listeners in `SKHtmlCanvas.ts`/`.js`, no input event interop in `SKHtmlCanvasInterop.cs`, no `OnTouch`/`OnWheel` parameters on Blazor view components.
- **Runtime verification**: Blazor WASM app with `SkiaSharp.Views.Blazor 3.119.2` — canvas element has no wheel handler (`canvas.onwheel` is null), dispatched `WheelEvent.defaultPrevented` is `false`.
- **Reference**: `SKTouchAction.WheelChanged` and `SKTouchEventArgs.WheelDelta` exist in the MAUI event model but are not exposed in Blazor views.

The issue provides a complete implementation spec with v120 normalization logic and cross-browser validation data. Ready for implementation.
